title: Small-Batch Roasts
blurb: We roast in-house every week and rotate single-origin beans from farms we work with directly.

title: Fresh Pastries
blurb: Croissants, scones, and loaf cakes baked from scratch each morning — nothing shipped in frozen.

title: Room to Work
blurb: Free wifi, plenty of outlets, and a quiet back room if you need to take a call or settle in for the day.

title: Private Catering
blurb: Coffee service and pastry boxes for meetings, showers, and small events around Worcester.
